---
title: "shiny"
format: html
runtime: shiny
---


```{r}
library(shiny)
ui = fluidPage(
selectInput(inputId = "mySelection", 
            label = h3("Select box"),
    choices = list("Choice 1" = 1, "Choice 2" = 2, "Choice 3" = 3),
    selected = 1), 
  
  verbatimTextOutput(
  outputId = "myOutput"
)
  
)
server = function(input, output) {
  output$myOutput = renderText({
    paste(paste("This is my choice"), input$mySelection)
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)  
```
